translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một que diêm.
translations.nl: Ik ben op zoek naar een lucifer.
translations.hi: मैं एक माचिस की तीली ढूंढ रही हूँ।
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari sebatang korek api.
translations.ja: マッチを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; denotes the action of searching/looking for.
Indefinite article, accusative singular neuter; determiner modifying 'Zündholz' as the direct object.
Neuter noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'suche'.

translations.en: You don't have a match with you.
translations.fr: Tu n'as pas d'allumette sur toi.
translations.it: Non hai un fiammifero con te.
translations.ru: У тебя с собой нет спичек.
translations.pt: Você não tem um fósforo com você.
translations.vi: Bạn không mang theo que diêm.
translations.nl: Je hebt geen lucifer bij je.
translations.uk: У тебе з собою немає сірників.
translations.hi: तुम्हारे पास माचिस की तीली नहीं है।
translations.nb: Du har ikke en fyrstikk på deg.
translations.sv: Du har ingen tändsticka på dig.
translations.ro: Nu ai un chibrit la tine.
translations.da: Du har ikke en tændstik på dig.
translations.ja: マッチを持っていません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; expresses possession.
Negative determiner/article, accusative singular neuter; modifies and negates 'Zündholz' as the object.
Neuter noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'hast'.
Adverb meaning 'along/with you'; indicates accompanying circumstance.

sentences.target: Er zündet die Kerze mit einem Zündholz an.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ ˈt͡sʏndət diː ˈkɛʁt͡sə mɪt ˈaɪ̯nəm ˈt͡sʏnthɔlt͡s an/

translations.de: Er zündet die Kerze mit einem Zündholz an.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ ˈt͡sʏndət diː ˈkɛʁt͡sə mɪt ˈaɪ̯nəm ˈt͡sʏnthɔlt͡s an/
translations.en: He lights the candle with a match.
translations.es: Él enciende la vela con una cerilla.
translations.fr: Il allume la bougie avec une allumette.
translations.it: Accende la candela con un fiammifero.
translations.pt: Ele acende a vela com um fósforo.
translations.he: הוא מדליק את הנר עם גפרור.
translations.vi: Anh ấy châm nến bằng que diêm.
translations.nl: Hij steekt de kaars aan met een lucifer.
translations.hi: वह माचिस की तीली से मोमबत्ती जलाता है।
translations.el: Ανάβει το κερί με ένα σπίρτο.
translations.nb: Han tenner stearinlyset med en fyrstikk.
translations.id: Dia menyalakan lilin dengan korek api.
translations.sv: Han tänder ljuset med en tändsticka.
translations.ro: El aprinde lumânarea cu un chibrit.
translations.da: Han tænder stearinlyset med en tændstik.
translations.ja: 彼はマッチでろうそくに火をつけます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; verb of the separable verb 'anzünden' (to light).
Definite article, accusative singular feminine; determiner of 'Kerze'.
Feminine noun, accusative singular; direct object.
Preposition governing dative; introduces an instrumental prepositional phrase.
Indefinite article, dative singular neuter; determiner of 'Zündholz' within the PP.
Neuter noun, dative singular; object of the preposition 'mit'.
Separable verbal particle completing the verb 'anzünden'; placed clause-final in main clause.

sentences.target: Im Schrank liegt noch ein Zündholz.

translations.de: Im Schrank liegt noch ein Zündholz.
translations.en: There's still a match in the cupboard.
translations.es: En el armario aún queda una cerilla.
translations.fr: Il reste une allumette dans le placard.
translations.ru: В шкафу ещё есть одна спичка.
translations.pt: Ainda há um fósforo no armário.
translations.vi: Trong tủ vẫn còn một que diêm.
translations.ar: ما زال هناك عود ثقاب في الخزانة.
translations.nl: In de kast ligt nog een lucifer.
translations.uk: У шафі ще є один сірник.
translations.hu: A szekrényben még van egy gyufa.
translations.hi: अलमारी में अभी भी एक माचिस की तीली है।
translations.pl: W szafce jest jeszcze jedna zapałka.
translations.el: Στο ντουλάπι υπάρχει ακόμα ένα σπίρτο.
translations.nb: Det ligger fortsatt en fyrstikk i skapet.
translations.id: Di lemari masih ada sebatang korek api.
translations.sv: Det ligger fortfarande en tändsticka i skåpet.
translations.ro: În dulap mai e un chibrit.
translations.cs: Ve skříni je ještě jedna zápalka.
translations.da: Der ligger stadig en tændstik i skabet.
translations.ja: 戸棚にまだマッチが一本あります。

tokens.explanation: Preposition (contracted form of 'in dem'), governs dative; forms a locative prepositional phrase.
Masculine noun, dative singular governed by 'Im'; object of the preposition.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive verb indicating location.
Adverb meaning 'still/yet'; modifies the predicate.
Indefinite article, nominative singular neuter; determiner of the subject 'Zündholz'.
Neuter noun, nominative singular; grammatical subject appearing postverbally.
